title: Mike Baron
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Mike Baron''' is a veteran comic book writer who scripted all three ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' comic book adaptations; [[Heir to the Empire (comics)|''Heir to the Empire'']], [[Dark Force Rising (comics)|''Dark Force Rising'']] and [[The Last Command (comics)|''The Last Command'']]. He also wrote the first four issues of the ongoing [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''X-Wing: Rogue Squadron'']] series.

==Star Wars Works==
===Comics===
===Thrawn Trilogy===
*[[Heir to the Empire (comics)|''Heir to the Empire'']]
*[[Dark Force Rising (comics)|''Dark Force Rising'']]
*[[The Last Command (comics)|''The Last Command'']]
===[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''X-Wing: Rogue Squadron'']]===
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 1]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 3]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 4|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 4]]
